message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
autonumber
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam responseMessageBelowArrow true
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantPadding 2
skinparam boxPadding 10

box " " #LightBlue
participant "ListPrivateImpl" as ListPrivateImpl
participant "ProfileRetrievalService" as ProfileRetrievalService
participant "DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl" as DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl
participant "DFSSystem" as DFSSystem
participant "DFSConnectionService" as DFSConnectionService
participant "DFSConnectionServiceImpl" as DFSConnectionServiceImpl
participant "DFSConnection" as DFSConnection
participant "GsonSerde" as GsonSerde
participant "BucketAccessService" as BucketAccessService
participant "BucketAccessServiceImpl" as BucketAccessServiceImpl
participant "DFSCredentialsService" as DFSCredentialsService
participant "DFSCredentialsServiceImpl" as DFSCredentialsServiceImpl
participant "DocumentListService" as DocumentListService
participant "ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl" as ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl
participant "ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl" as ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl
end box

ListPrivateImpl -> ListPrivateImpl: resolvePrivateLocation
ListPrivateImpl -> ProfileRetrievalService: privateProfile
ProfileRetrievalService -> DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl: privateProfile
activate DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl
DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl -> DFSSystem: systemDfs
activate DFSSystem
DFSSystem --> DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl: DFSAccess
deactivate DFSSystem
DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl -> DFSConnectionService: obtain
activate DFSConnectionService
DFSConnectionService -> DFSConnectionServiceImpl: obtain
activate DFSConnectionServiceImpl
DFSConnectionServiceImpl --> DFSConnectionService: DFSConnection
deactivate DFSConnectionServiceImpl
DFSConnectionService --> DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl: DFSConnection
deactivate DFSConnectionService
DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl -> DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl: locatePrivateProfile
activate DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl
DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl -> BucketAccessService: BucketPath
activate BucketAccessService
BucketAccessService -> GsonSerde: getBlob
activate GsonSerde
GsonSerde --> BucketAccessService: Payload
deactivate GsonSerde
BucketAccessService --> DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl: fromJson
deactivate BucketAccessService
DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl -> DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl: T
DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl --> ProfileRetrievalService: UserPrivateProfile
deactivate DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl
ProfileRetrievalService --> ListPrivateImpl: UserPrivateProfile
ListPrivateImpl -> BucketAccessService: privateAccessFor
activate BucketAccessService
BucketAccessService -> BucketAccessServiceImpl: privateAccessFor
activate BucketAccessServiceImpl
BucketAccessServiceImpl -> DFSCredentialsService: privateUserCredentials
activate DFSCredentialsService
DFSCredentialsService -> DFSCredentialsServiceImpl: privateUserCredentials
activate DFSCredentialsServiceImpl
DFSCredentialsServiceImpl -> DFSSystem: systemDfs
activate DFSSystem
DFSSystem --> DFSCredentialsServiceImpl: DFSAccess
deactivate DFSSystem
DFSCredentialsServiceImpl --> DFSCredentialsService: DFSCredentials
deactivate DFSCredentialsServiceImpl
DFSCredentialsService --> BucketAccessServiceImpl: DFSCredentials
deactivate DFSCredentialsService
BucketAccessServiceImpl --> BucketAccessService: DFSAccess
deactivate BucketAccessServiceImpl
BucketAccessService --> ListPrivateImpl: DFSAccess
deactivate BucketAccessService
ListPrivateImpl -> DocumentListService: list
activate DocumentListService
DocumentListService -> ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl: obtain
activate ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl
ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl -> DFSConnectionService: obtain
activate DFSConnectionService
DFSConnectionService -> DFSConnectionServiceImpl: obtain
activate DFSConnectionServiceImpl
DFSConnectionServiceImpl --> DFSConnectionService: DFSConnection
deactivate DFSConnectionServiceImpl
DFSConnectionService --> ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl: DFSConnection
deactivate DFSConnectionService
ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl -> ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl: list
activate ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl
ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl -> ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl: list
ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl --> ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl: List
deactivate ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl
ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl --> DocumentListService: Stream
deactivate ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl
DocumentListService --> ListPrivateImpl: Stream
deactivate DocumentListService

@enduml
```
